message:
feat(migration): implement M0-M2 export-import pipeline with manifest digest verification

Creates recorder_migration.rs with MigrationEngine orchestrating M0 preflight
(health check, manifest capture), M1 export (FNV-1a ordinal digest), and M2
import (digest + count verification). Includes MigrationStage enum, MigrationManifest,
MigrationCheckpoint, and MigrationError types. 30 tests covering all stages,
error paths, batch sizing, and serialization roundtrips.

Closes ft-2vuw7.1.4.1.3.1.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
